user.title: Select Neewer Light
user.description: Select a discovered Neewer BLE light to add.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Neewer Light
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to add the Neewer light **{name}** ({address})?

manual.title: Manual Entry
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth address of your Neewer light manually.

error.device_not_found: Device not found. Make sure the light is powered on and in range.
error.invalid_address: Invalid Bluetooth address format. Use format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device.

abort.no_devices_found: No Neewer lights found. Make sure your lights are powered on and Bluetooth is enabled.
abort.not_neewer_device: This device does not appear to be a Neewer light.

init.title: Neewer Light Options
init.description: Configure defaults, model detection, and protocol overrides. The integration reloads this device after saving.

data.power_off_with_brightness_zero: Use brightness 0 instead of the power-off command
data.cct_only: Use separate CCT brightness and temperature commands

error.invalid_cct_range: The lowest color temperature must be lower than the highest color temperature.
error.default_color_temp_out_of_range: The default color temperature must be within the configured range.
